purpose: A generic banner element for showing prominent messages within page content. Distinct from MessageStrip (inline validation) and NotificationBanner (system-wide, at page top). Used inside cards, panels, or content sections to highlight important information.
whenToUse: Highlight an important content-level message inside a card or panel
Show a feature announcement inline within a business flow
Communicate context-specific information (e.g. 'This item is read-only')
Draw attention to a change or milestone in content
doRules: Include a dismiss action if the banner is not blocking
Pair color with icon and text — never state-by-color alone
dontRules: Do not stack multiple banners in the same section
Do not use as a persistent header — content moves as user scrolls
Do not use for critical errors — use MessageStrip or Dialog instead
Do not use decorative banners without a real message

layoutGuidance.placement: Inside page content, cards, or panels
layoutGuidance.sizing: Height ~60–80px depending on density; full parent width
layoutGuidance.alignment: Icon left · title+description middle · dismiss right

contentGuidance.contentRules: Title states the fact; description gives context or action
examples: Read-only mode — this record has been locked by another user

requirements: Focus is not stolen unless critical
